title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people picking apples. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A woman and two children are picking apples in an orchard. One child is reaching for an apple on a low branch while the woman is holding a basket. There are apple trees, grass and fruit in the basket.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows students singing in a school show. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A group of students are singing on a small school stage. They are standing in a row and holding microphones while a teacher plays the piano nearby. There are curtains and lights behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
